patch_description: Introduce a lightweight local-search (simulated-annealing style hill-climb) step that jointly refines circle centers to allow larger radii while maintaining non-overlap and containment. The radii are recomputed after each proposed center perturbation. This explores nearby configurations beyond the rigid-ring initialization, potentially increasing the sum of radii. The search is deterministic (fixed RNG seed) and lightweight to keep runtime reasonable, and it preserves the original interface and validity constraints.
